/usr/bin/ar qc libpmx-common.a CMakeFiles/pmx-common.dir/src/common/thread/Thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmx-common.dir/src/common/thread/Mutex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmx-common.dir/src/common/log/appender/SvgAppender.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pmx-common.dir/src/common/log/appender/TelemetryAppender.cpp.o
